content: {"analysis":"Intermittent fasting (IF) is a dietary pattern alternating between eating and fasting periods. Research spans metabolic mechanisms, cardiovascular outcomes, weight management, glycemic control, adverse effects, and long-term safety. Key questions cover efficacy vs caloric restriction, optimal protocols (16:8, 5:2, ADF), population-specific risks, and regulatory/clinical guidance.","sub_queries":[{"query":"intermittent fasting metabolic mechanisms autophagy insulin sensitivity systematic review meta-analysis randomized controlled trial","intent":"Identify peer-reviewed evidence on biological mechanisms and clinical efficacy of intermittent fasting","source_preference":"academic","perspective":"Scientific"},{"query":"intermittent fasting clinical guidelines dietary recommendations FDA EFSA health authority position statement","intent":"Find official government and regulatory body guidance on intermittent fasting safety and recommendations","source_preference":"both","perspective":"Regulatory"},{"query":"intermittent fasting commercial apps Zero Fastic meal replacement product market growth","intent":"Survey commercial intermittent fasting products, apps, and industry offerings","source_preference":"web","perspective":"Industry"},{"query":"intermittent fasting cost effectiveness weight loss obesity healthcare savings economic analysis","intent":"Assess economic impact and cost-benefit of intermittent fasting versus other weight-loss interventions","source_preference":"web","perspective":"Economic"},{"query":"intermittent fasting population epidemiology cardiovascular mortality diabetes incidence cohort study","intent":"Examine population-level health outcomes and epidemiological data on intermittent fasting","source_preference":"both","perspective":"Public_Health"},{"query":"intermittent fasting history origin Ramadan religious fasting landmark studies Longo Mattson foundational research","intent":"Trace the historical development and foundational studies of intermittent fasting research","source_preference":"academic","perspective":"Historical"},{"query":"intermittent fasting adoption United States Europe Asia cultural practices regional prevalence","intent":"Understand geographic and cultural variations in intermittent fasting practices and outcomes","source_preference":"web","perspective":"Regional"},{"query":"intermittent fasting study design time-restricted eating protocol adherence measurement dietary assessment methodology","intent":"Review methodological approaches and measurement protocols in intermittent fasting research","source_preference":"academic","perspective":"Methodological"},{"query":"intermittent fasting 2024 2025 new research circadian rhythm precision nutrition GLP-1 emerging evidence","intent":"Identify recent innovations and emerging trends in intermittent fasting science","source_preference":"web","perspective":"Emerging_Trends"}]}
